scheme_name: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

sections.text:
Scheme: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth
Category: Equity Small Cap
Risk: Very High Risk
NAV: ₹158.56
NAV date: 19 Jun '26
AUM: ₹38,809.48 Cr
Min SIP: 100
Expense ratio: 0.77%

fields.scheme_name: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

sections.text:
Exit load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Stamp duty: Stamp duty A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

fields.exit_load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
fields.stamp_duty: Stamp duty A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

sections.text:
Minimum investments:
Min. for 1st investment: ₹100
Min. for 2nd investment: ₹100
Min. for SIP: ₹100
Fund benchmark: BSE 250 SmallCap Total Return Index
Tax implication: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

fields.tax_implication: If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.text:
Fund management:
Manager 1: Dhruv Muchhal
Tenure: Jun 2023
Education: Mr. Dhruv has done B.Com, CA and CFA
Experience: Prior to joining HDFC MF,he has worked with Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd., Goldman Sachs, CRISIL Global Research & Analytics and Deloitte Haskins & Sells
Manager 2: Chirag Setalvad
Tenure: Jun 2014
Education: Mr. Setalvad is a B. Sc and MBA from University of North Carolina.
Experience: Prior to joining HDFC AMC he has worked with New Vernon Advisory Services Ltd., HDFC AMC and ING Barings N.V.
Also manages: HDFC Flexi Cap Direct Plan Growth; HDFC Value Fund Direct Plan Growth; HDFC Low Duration Fund Direct Growth; HDFC Focused Fund Direct Growth; HDFC Floating Rate Debt Fund Direct Plan Growth
(+49 more schemes)
